description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and a slightly rounded head. Its plumage features a mix of earthy brown, gray, and muted orange tones, with subtle mottling and lighter markings along the wings and flanks. The beak is short and conical, blending smoothly into the head, and the eyes are small and dark, set forward on the face. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is short and appears slightly squared at the tip. The legs are not prominently visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, mimicking the look of real feathers.
description: A medium-sized, brown-gray bird with mottled plumage, a short conical beak, and a squared tail. The surface is matte and feather-like, with subtle color gradients.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's full profile, highlighting the mottled brown and gray plumage and the smooth, conical beak.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the rounded back, squared tail, and subtle feather patterning along the wings and rump.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible wing markings and the bird's streamlined body shape.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's face, short beak, and the gentle slope of the head and chest.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with subtle bars and patches of lighter and darker brown and gray
